nasb.text: My frame was not hidden from You, When I was made in secret, And skillfully wrought in the depths of the earth;

esv.text: My frame was not hidden from you, when I was being made in secret, intricately woven in the depths of the earth.

cnv.text: 我在隱密處被造， 在地的深處被塑造， 那時，我的形體不能向你隱藏。

ccb.text: 我在隐秘处被造、在母腹中成形的时候， 你对我的形体一清二楚。

csbs.text: 当我在隐秘处受造、在大地的深处被织成时， 我的形体不能向你隐藏。
